name: pangostack
description: Tooling-only root: git hooks (husky) that run lint --fix on staged files, plus dev scripts that start the docker compose infrastructure and all three dev servers. Each package (backend, frontend, worker) still manages its own dependencies separately.

scripts.dev: npm run dev:infra && concurrently -n temporal,backend,worker,frontend -c yellow,blue,magenta,green --kill-others-on-fail "npm:dev:temporal" "npm:dev:backend" "npm:dev:worker" "npm:dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose -f dev/pango/docker-compose.yml up -d --wait postgresql pgadmin
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix worker install && npm --prefix frontend install
